evals.prompt: Create an ElevenLabs CLI-ready project under ./outputs/ for a restaurant reservation assistant. Include the agent configuration, any required tool configurations, and a short README with the exact CLI commands a user would run to initialize and push it later. Also include the actual system prompt text snippet for the restaurant reservation assistant in the README or in your final response. The assistant should be able to check availability, book tables, and confirm reservations. Do not actually deploy it.
evals.expected_output: CLI-ready project artifacts for a restaurant reservation voice agent
expectations: Creates a CLI-style agent project under outputs
Includes README with 'elevenlabs agents init' or equivalent CLI setup command
Includes README with 'elevenlabs agents push' or equivalent deploy command
Includes the system prompt text for the restaurant reservation assistant in the README or final response
Configures at least one tool for checking availability or booking

evals.prompt: Show me how to embed an ElevenLabs voice agent widget on my React website. The agent ID is 'abc123'.
evals.expected_output: Code showing how to embed the ElevenLabs conversational AI widget
expectations: Uses the elevenlabs-convai web component or React wrapper
Includes the agent-id attribute set to 'abc123'
Shows proper script tag or npm package import for the widget
Provides a working HTML or React component example

evals.prompt: Create an ElevenLabs agent configuration with a custom webhook tool that calls our inventory API at https://api.example.com/inventory to check product stock levels.
evals.expected_output: Agent configuration with webhook tool definition
expectations: Defines a tool with type 'webhook' or equivalent
Configures the webhook URL to https://api.example.com/inventory
Includes a description for the tool that the LLM can understand
Defines appropriate parameters/schema for the tool
